name: Ratchanter
tips: Ratchanter is both a Mage and a Rat — he benefits from Dark Matter buffs (Shady Trade Deal, Dark Matter Stash, Grave Caller) AND counts as a promote target for Giant Rat.
Each activation conjures a Common Rat and buffs ALL Rats on board. The more Rats you have, the more value each 2-mana activation provides.
With Dark Matter stacks, the conjured Rats arrive with bonus stats. At 3 DM, each activation gives the new Rat +3🗡️/+3🤍 on top of its base 10/10.
Ratchanter + Giant Rat is the core Rat engine: conjure Rats for board width, and if Giant Rat dies, any Rat can promote into a fresh one.
At 15/30 he's tanky enough to survive most early trades. Protect him in the back row and use him as a Rat factory rather than a frontline fighter.
